title: The Revenant Howls in Darkness
overview: Yuliy and the Jaegers plan an assault on a vampire meeting in Shanghai, then follow the ringleaders across the sea to Tokyo.

title: Deprived Talent
overview: After Agatha's attack, Yuliy recovers at the house of a doctor conducting advanced research. Agatha hasn't given up yet.

title: Indelible Memories
overview: Shaken by his encounter with one of the vampires during the attack, Yuliy recalls his childhood and how he came to meet Willard.

title: Beginning of Trickery
overview: The team investigates the researcher's death, and Willard crosses paths with a secret agent. Yuliy and Dorothea head to Shizuoka.

title: The Frankenstein
overview: Aboard the train, Yuliy meets someone he thought was dead: his brother. When a group of bandits attacks the train, they make a strange discovery.

title: Mokingbird's Song
overview: The vampires determine that the Ark of Sirius isn't in Tokyo, but they still have one task left in the city. Willard learns something urgent at the bar.

title: True Confession
overview: The military interrupts the vampire assault on the mansion. Mikhail and then Kershner tell Yuliy about the Ark and how it relates to his past.

title: The Sanctuary of Sirius
overview: Alone, Yuliy heads to southern Karafuto/Sakhalin on the trail of the Ark of Sirius. His brother and the vampire prince Yevgraf are already there.

title: Father's Shadow
overview: Yuliy and Bishop meet an old man who knew Yuliy's father, Alexei, but he refuses to say anything further. In town, they run into Ryoko and Iba.

title: Memories of the Abyss
overview: Willard and the Jaegers find an artifact related to the Ark and set out after Yuliy, who's almost reached both the sanctuary of the Ark and his father.

title: Calling in Blood
overview: As Willard and the Jaegers fly towards Karafuto, Bishop makes his move. With Ryoko and Iba as backup, Yuliy confronts the vampires and his brother.

title: The Ark of Sirius
overview: Mikhail confronts Yevgraf, but he's already consumed the Ark. With Yuliy and Willard aboard, the airship flies toward the final confrontation.
